# init(itemLoadingToken:customLabel:)

**Initializer**

Creates an item result with the specified item load token and custom label.

## Declaration

```swift
init(itemLoadingToken: NSAccessibilityLoadingToken, customLabel: String)
```

## Creating an Item Result

- **init(targetElement:)**: Creates an item result with the specified target element.

items.description: Creates an item result with the specified target element.
items.name: init(targetElement:)
